home.routing_desc: File-based routing, dynamic routes, parallel routes, intercepting routes, and more.
home.data_desc: Server-side fetching, client-side queries, caching, revalidation, and server actions.
home.rendering_desc: Server components, client components, composition patterns, and state management.
home.ui_desc: CSS, images, fonts, metadata, animations, and theming.
home.advanced_desc: Proxy, i18n, auth, draft mode, edge runtime, MDX, and more.
home.config_desc: Environment variables, redirects, headers, CSP, and bundle analysis.
home.api_desc: Route handlers with Hono — REST CRUD, OG image generation, and streaming.
